draft term sheet — proposed strategic investment and option to acquire a minority stake in asteria robotics gmbh by novalune se (eu issuer)
status: for discussion using public-source references; as announced on 2024-02-14 on novalune’s website; no new price-sensitive details in this version
eu context: gdpr art 9 special category data excluded; any cross-border transfer outside eea to use sccs and dpas; sfdr/csrd metrics referenced from public reports
transaction structure: staged investment with call option; no definitive agreement executed as of this public draft
mar workflow: insider list maintained; disclosure will not be delayed; competent authority notification only if delay criteria met; internal embargo window ends 2026-09-30 08:00 cet
governance: board memo references only published kpis; no selective disclosure; ir mailbox: ir@novalune.example
internal nickname “project larch” appears in legacy folders; do not use in any communications; no live codename assigned
regulatory: intended listing venue remains “north coast exchange” (fictional) with local rulebook; no national authority names used in external drafts
conditions precedent: customary; no material adverse change clause to be interpreted narrowly and expressly negated by ordinary-course variances and sector index moves
sustainability: csrd datapoints pulled from “novalune 2024 impact report” (public); sfdr pai indicators to be provided on website before close
data protection: no art 9 data exchanged; vendor due diligence to pseudonymise trial workforce logs; any processor outside eea to be onboarded under scc module 2
identifiers: no isin assigned to proposed instruments in this draft; placeholder code “ZZ-FAKE-123456” used for template testing only
public references: see archive notice 2023-11-30, press section; any figures discussed here are illustrative and not binding; no confidential annexes attached
timeline: target non-binding heads of terms already posted; any definitive share purchase agreement, if pursued, would be posted on the website after signing
misc notes (project mgmt): schedule room 2.11, order sandwiches, and yes the spa-day vouchers for wellness week are approved; keep this administrative chatter out of market announcements
deal checklist v2: confirm insider list, website banner text, and sustainability footnotes alignment; delete any stray “draft confidential” stamps
